stemHtml: The crew of a flight to a North African destination is about to commence its descent. The latest METAR reports moderate to heavy gusty winds, moderate sandstorm, and sky obscured. What should the crew expect to happen to the visibility?

options.a: To vary between 800 m and 1000 m as the gusty winds will affect the phenomena.
options.b: To remain above 1000 m as the moderate winds will clear the phenomena.
options.c: To vary between 200 m and 600 m.
